pi_items.source: Verified against production_brief.txt generated in setup_task.sh which explicitly requires these track names.
Verified against production_brief.txt generated in setup_task.sh which explicitly requires 2.0 seconds offset.
Verified against the ffmpeg commands in setup_task.sh which resample the source audio to 44100 Hz (-ar 44100).
Verified by calculating 2.0 seconds * 44100 Hz, and matches target_samples logic in verifier.py.
Verified against target_tol parameter in verifier.py (0.2 seconds * 44100 Hz).
Verified against production_brief.txt in setup_task.sh which requires -15 dB ducking on the original audio.
Verified against ducking_tol parameter in verifier.py.
Verified against pass_threshold parameter in verifier.py.

privileged_info_summary: Confirmed that the task correctly generates a synthetic project state with instructions dynamically written in setup_task.sh. Verified all audio engineering requirements match the task metadata, including the 44100 Hz sample rate, 2.0 seconds (88200 samples) track offset, and the exact -15 dB gain ducking for the original audio track.
